description_for_human: Analyze Copilot usage, seat data, and spend to surface ROI insights.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user provides pasted text, CSV-style content, spreadsheet exports, or document summaries containing Copilot usage, seats, spend, adoption, or ROI-related data. The plugin helps extract and structure the data for analysis and recommendation generation.

conversation_starters.title: Analyze a usage export
conversation_starters.text: Analyze this Copilot usage export and tell me whether the company is getting value from it.

functions.name: analyze_copilot_value
functions.description: Analyze Copilot usage, seats, and spend data from text or document extracts and return a structured value assessment.

source_text.description: Extracted text or spreadsheet contents containing usage, seats, and spend data.

company_name.description: Optional company name to label the analysis.

source_type.description: The source format of the input data.

returns.description: A structured analysis payload containing metrics, insights, risks, and recommendations.

reasoning.description: This function analyzes Copilot usage and spend data to help identify ROI and adoption patterns.
instructions: Use the provided source_text as the only source of business facts.
Extract seats, usage, spend, and time-based signals when present.
If the input is incomplete, return the missing fields instead of guessing.

responding.description: Return the analysis in a business-friendly structure that can be summarized by the agent.
instructions: Summarize the analysis as a scorecard, insights, gaps, and recommendations.
Do not invent metrics or conclusions that are not supported by the input.
